ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the observation was made */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity value */,
  "humidity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of humidity (e.g., percentage) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed value */,
  "wind_speed_unit" TEXT /* Unit of wind speed (e.g., miles per hour, kilometers per hour) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation value */,
  "precipitation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of precipitation (e.g., inches, millimeters) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "barometric_pressure" REAL /* Barometric pressure value */,
  "barometric_pressure_unit" TEXT /* Unit of barometric pressure (e.g., inches of mercury, millibars) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility value */,
  "visibility_unit" TEXT /* Unit of visibility (e.g., miles, kilometers) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator (e.g., good, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "temperature_high" REAL /* High temperature for the forecasted day */,
  "temperature_low" REAL /* Low temperature for the forecasted day */,
  "precipitation_chance" REAL /* Chance of precipitation for the forecasted day */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the alert was issued */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., tornado, flood) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, watch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station using the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., numerical, statistical) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecast_models" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to generate the forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "temperature_high" REAL /* High temperature for the forecasted day */,
  "temperature_low" REAL /* Low temperature for the forecasted day */,
  "precipitation_chance" REAL /* Chance of precipitation for the forecasted day */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id", "model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecast_models_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format used for import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_imports_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES weather_data_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the import being processed */,
  "process_date" TEXT /* Date of the process */,
  "process_status" TEXT /* Status of the process (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_processes_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES weather_data_imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
